source_name: Russia — Federal List of Extremist Materials (FSEM) — Wikipedia overview
_note: Curated subset from EN Wikipedia's overview of the FSEM, the Russian Ministry of Justice's list of banned 'extremist materials' (started 2007, ~5,500 entries total, mostly non-book content). This batch covers only entries with identifiable book + author + entry-number. Each entry's locator is the FSEM ordinal No. The Russian original list (minjust.gov.ru) is the upstream source; Wikipedia summarizes it.

entries.title: Mein Kampf
entries.author: Adolf Hitler
entries.description: Banned by Russia's Federal List of Extremist Materials (FSEM #604). Hitler's autobiographical political manifesto, first published 1925-26.

entries.title: The Doctrine of Fascism
entries.author: Benito Mussolini
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#608, #668). Mussolini's 1932 codification of fascist ideology.

entries.title: Memoirs 1942-1943
entries.author: Benito Mussolini
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#732).

entries.title: Third Way: Without Democrats and Communists
entries.author: Benito Mussolini
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2285).

entries.title: The SS Man and the Question of Blood
entries.author: Heinrich Himmler
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#767). Himmler's 1942 essay on SS racial ideology.

entries.title: Diaries of 1945
entries.author: Joseph Goebbels
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#795). Final entries of Goebbels's diary.

entries.title: Michael: A German Destiny in Diary Form
entries.author: Joseph Goebbels
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2385). Goebbels's 1929 semi-autobiographical novel.

entries.title: Memoirs
entries.author: Alfred Rosenberg
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1648). Memoir by the Nazi ideologue executed at Nuremberg.

entries.title: The Myth of the Twentieth Century
entries.author: Alfred Rosenberg
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2532). Rosenberg's 1930 racial-ideology treatise.

entries.title: Program and Outlook of the NSDAP
entries.author: Gottfried Feder
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2000). Feder's 1932 NSDAP-programme exposition.

entries.title: The International Jew
entries.author: Henry Ford
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#459, #2955). Ford's 1920 antisemitic pamphlet series.

entries.title: Hitler's Table Talk
entries.author: Henry Picker
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#711). Compiled records of Hitler's wartime monologues.

entries.title: The Last Will of a Russian Fascist
entries.author: Konstantin Rodzaevsky
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#861). 1946 testament by the leader of the Russian Fascist Party in Manchuria.

entries.title: Dezionization
entries.author: Valery Yemelyanov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#970). Soviet-era antisemitic and anti-Zionist tract.

entries.title: The Myth of the Holocaust: The Truth About the Fate of the Jews in World War II
entries.author: Jürgen Graf
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#973). Holocaust-denial book by Swiss revisionist.

entries.title: The Jewish Question as a Question of Racial Character and Its Harmful Influence on the Existence of Peoples, on Manners and Culture
entries.author: Eugen Dühring
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#979, #3329). 1881 antisemitic tract by German philosopher; influenced later Nazi racial theory.

entries.title: Das Judenthum in der Musik
entries.author: Richard Wagner
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1204). Wagner's 1850 antisemitic essay on Jews in music.

entries.title: God's People
entries.author: Grigory Klimov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1456). Émigré Soviet author's conspiracist text.

entries.title: Red Kabbalah
entries.author: Grigory Klimov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1957).

entries.title: Protocols of the Soviet Wise Men
entries.author: Grigory Klimov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1958).

entries.title: Skins: Rus' is Awakening
entries.author: Dmitry Nesterov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1482). Skinhead-movement novel.

entries.title: Investigation about the murder of Christian babies by Jews and the use of their blood
entries.author: Vladimir Dal
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1494). 19th-century blood-libel pamphlet; authorship disputed (commonly attributed to Vladimir Dal).

entries.title: Hitler without lies and myths
entries.author: Valentin Prussakov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1596). Russian-author biography of Hitler.

entries.title: La France juive
entries.author: Édouard Drumont
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1791). Drumont's 1886 antisemitic two-volume work; key text of French anti-Dreyfus far-right.

entries.title: Russian Nationalism: Its Friends and Enemies
entries.author: Alexander Sevastyanov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2138).

entries.title: What do the Jews want from us?
entries.author: Alexander Sevastyanov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2139).

entries.title: Restruct!
entries.author: Maxim Martsinkevich
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2572). Russian neo-Nazi 'Tesak'-figure's manifesto.

entries.title: Jews in history
entries.author: Alexey Shmakov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2931). Early-20th-century antisemitic tract.

entries.title: International Secret Government
entries.author: Alexey Shmakov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#4183).

entries.title: Secret Jewish Teachings. Part X. The Fruits of Wisdom
entries.author: Michael Laitman
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#3151). Kabbalah-instruction text by Israeli rabbi.

entries.title: The Mystery of the Protocols of Zion
entries.author: Oleg Platonov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#4347).

entries.title: Zion Protocols in World Politics
entries.author: Oleg Platonov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#4413).

entries.title: Russia and the World Evil
entries.author: Oleg Platonov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#5076).

entries.title: Ritual Murders
entries.author: Oleg Platonov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#5077).

entries.title: Crown of Thorns of Russia
entries.author: Oleg Platonov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#5078).

entries.title: The Mystery of Lawlessness
entries.author: Oleg Platonov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#5079).

entries.title: Judaism and Freemasonry
entries.author: Oleg Platonov
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#5080).

entries.title: Soviet genocide in Ukraine
entries.author: Raphael Lemkin
entries._note: Note: same FSEM no. 4413 as Platonov's Zion Protocols above — Wikipedia transcription error or duplicate ordinal in the source. Imported with the ordinal as-given.
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#4413). Lemkin (the jurist who coined 'genocide') wrote this 1953 essay arguing the Holodomor met the criteria of genocide.

entries.title: The Jewish Question Through the Eyes of an American
entries.author: David Duke
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#5104). US white-supremacist author's antisemitic book.

entries.title: Siege
entries.author: James Mason
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM. Mason's collected essays advocating neo-Nazi accelerationism; influential text in 21st-century far-right terrorism.

entries.title: Blowing Up Russia
entries.author: Yuri Felshtinsky and Alexander Litvinenko
entries._note: Multi-author book; both attributions in book_authors.
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#2791). 2002 investigative book alleging FSB involvement in the 1999 Russian apartment bombings. Co-author Litvinenko was poisoned with polonium-210 in London in 2006.

entries.title: Violence as a method
entries.author: Boris Stomakhin
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#5004). By the Russian dissident journalist repeatedly imprisoned for anti-government writings.

entries.title: The Will
entries.author: Ruhollah Khomeini
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#143). Ayatollah Khomeini's political testament.

entries.title: What is Scientology?
entries.author: L. Ron Hubbard
entries._note: Listed as part of Scientology books no. 1170-1176; also re-listed in 2012 as 'Lectures for the PTS/SP course' (9 audio cassettes + 1 book).
entries.description: Banned by Russia's FSEM (#1170-1176). Scientology Church reference text. Hubbard's Scientology writings were originally listed (#632-660), delisted 26 April 2011, then re-added in 2012.
